title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for improving productivity with Claude Code: building LLM knowledge bases, implementing auto-research workflows, and applying context engineering. The video demonstrates how these techniques can be applied to accelerate software development projects.
